[REQ-14] The system should Monthly controlled-substance reports are generated for regulatory submission..

[REQ-01] The system should Register and enroll in available courses for the upcoming semester.
[REQ-02] Actor: Instructor — The Instructor should Allow instructors to upload grades and course materials for enrolled students.
[REQ-03] Actor: Student — The Student should Allow academic advisors to review student academic progress and suggest courses.
[REQ-04] The system should Generate tuition invoices and process online payment for registered students.
[REQ-05] Actor: Student — The Student should Send automated email notifications to students for deadlines and grade updates.
[REQ-06] Actor: Registrar — The Registrar should Allow the registrar to manage course schedules and assign instructors to courses.
[REQ-07] The system should Support transcript requests and official document generation for graduating students.
[REQ-08] The system should Ideally integrate with a third-party learning management system if budget allows.
[REQ-09] The system should be highly available with no more than one hour of downtime per month during the academic year.
[REQ-10] The system should respond within three seconds for all standard operations under peak load conditions.
[REQ-11] The system should support Arabic and English interfaces for all user roles.
[REQ-12] The system should comply with local university data protection regulations.
[REQ-13] The system should handle at least five hundred concurrent users during registration periods.
[REQ-14] The system should provide optional Mobile-friendly interface outside the initial release baseline.

[REQ-01] The system should Sensor data ingestion via MQTT/REST supporting 1000+ devices simultaneously..
[REQ-02] The system should Real-time dashboard with live charts, threshold indicators, and device status..
[REQ-03] The system should Alert management: configurable thresholds, escalation rules, multi-channel notifications..

[REQ-08] The system should refresh within 2 seconds of new data arrival..
[REQ-09] The system should Data retention: raw data for 90 days, aggregated data for 3 years..
[REQ-10] The system should End-to-end encryption for all device communication (TLS 1.3 minimum)..

[REQ-01] The system should Secure hospital data across all patient workflows and sensitive records.
[REQ-02] The system should Register and manage patient records including medical history and demographics.
[REQ-03] Actor: Doctor — The Doctor should Allow doctors to upload radiology reports and attach file links to patient records.
[REQ-04] The system should Enable staff to view attachments or file links associated with patient cases.
[REQ-05] The system should Generate management dashboard showing operational data and hospital statistics.
[REQ-06] The system should Implement role-based access control for all staff roles and departments.
[REQ-07] The system should Maintain audit logs for all data modifications and access events.
[REQ-08] The system should Process billing and generate invoices for patient services.
[REQ-09] The system should Send automated notifications for critical patient events.
[REQ-10] The system should maintain audit logs to ensure compliance and traceability.
[REQ-11] The system should be encrypted at rest and in transit.
[REQ-12] The system should comply with healthcare data protection regulations.
[REQ-13] The system should respond within two seconds for all standard operations.
[REQ-14] The system should depend on operational data from patient and billing modules.

[REQ-01] The system should Clients book appointments for services by selecting therapist and time..
[REQ-02] The system should Service menu is configured with duration, price, and staff availability..
[REQ-03] The system should Online deposit payment confirms appointments and reduces no-shows..
[REQ-04] The system should Automated reminders are sent 24 hours and 1 hour before appointments..
[REQ-05] The system should Staff schedules are managed with shift templates and time-off requests..
[REQ-06] The system should Client profiles store treatment history, preferences, and allergies..
[REQ-07] The system should Loyalty points are awarded per visit and redeemable for discounts..
[REQ-08] The system should Point-of-sale handles walk-in payments and product retail sales..
[REQ-09] The system should Gift vouchers are sold online and redeemed at checkout..
[REQ-10] The system should Commission tracking calculates therapist earnings per service performed..
[REQ-11] The system should Inventory tracks product stock with restocking alerts..
[REQ-12] The system should Customer feedback surveys are sent after appointments..
[REQ-13] The system should Revenue reports break down income by service category and staff member..
[REQ-14] The system should Waiting-list management fills canceled slots automatically..

[REQ-01] The system should Attorneys record billable time entries against client matters..
[REQ-02] The system should Expense disbursements are logged and allocated to client accounts..
[REQ-03] The system should Client invoices are generated from approved time and expense entries..
[REQ-04] The system should Trust account management tracks client funds held in escrow..
[REQ-05] The system should Electronic billing submissions are formatted to LEDES standards..
[REQ-06] The system should Write-off requests require partner approval before reducing invoiced amounts..
[REQ-07] The system should Credit notes and payment allocations adjust client balances..
[REQ-08] The system should Collections aging report shows overdue invoice amounts by client..
[REQ-09] The system should Budget tracking alerts attorneys when a matter approaches its fee cap..
[REQ-10] The system should Retainer replenishment requests are auto-triggered when trust balance is low..
[REQ-11] The system should Partner dashboards show billable hour targets and realization rates..
[REQ-12] The system should Revenue reports break down billings by practice group and client..
[REQ-13] The system should Conflict-of-interest checks are run when opening new client matters..
[REQ-14] The system should Audit trail logs all time entry modifications for compliance review..

You are a senior software project planner. Analyze the software requirements and produce a structured project plan as JSON. Output ONLY valid JSON with a top-level 'tasks' array. Each task must have: id (T001...), title, description, req_type (FR/NFR), complexity (1-5), dependencies (list of task IDs), source (line reference).

[REQ-01] The system should Register and enroll in available courses for the upcoming semester.
[REQ-02] Actor: Instructor — The Instructor should Allow instructors to upload grades and course materials for enrolled students.
[REQ-03] Actor: Student — The Student should Allow academic advisors to review student academic progress and suggest courses.
[REQ-04] The system should Generate tuition invoices and process online payment for registered students.
[REQ-05] Actor: Student — The Student should Send automated email notifications to students for deadlines and grade updates.
[REQ-06] Actor: Registrar — The Registrar should Allow the registrar to manage course schedules and assign instructors to courses.
[REQ-07] The system should Support transcript requests and official document generation for graduating students.
[REQ-08] The system should Ideally integrate with a third-party learning management system if budget allows.
[REQ-09] The system should be highly available with no more than one hour of downtime per month during the academic year.
[REQ-10] The system should respond within three seconds for all standard operations under peak load conditions.
[REQ-11] The system should support Arabic and English interfaces for all user roles.
[REQ-12] The system should comply with local university data protection regulations.
[REQ-13] The system should handle at least five hundred concurrent users during registration periods.
[REQ-14] The system should provide optional Mobile-friendly interface outside the initial release baseline.
